nasb.text: “Now it shall come about when he sits on the throne of his kingdom, he shall write for himself a copy of this law on a scroll in the presence of the Levitical priests.

esv.text: “And when he sits on the throne of his kingdom, he shall write for himself in a book a copy of this law, approved by the Levitical priests.

cnv.text: “他登上了國位的時候，就要把利未支派的祭司面前的律法書，為自己抄錄一份副本。

ccb.text: 他登基后，要在利未祭司面前为自己抄录一份律法书，
